meta.description: HAUNT CTRL v3 yard layout — compiled from Google Earth measurement screenshots (surveyed pass, 11 measurements)

coordinate_system.x_axis: Width of property. 0 = left yard edge, increases rightward, 57 = driveway edge at the front
coordinate_system.y_axis: Depth of property. 0 = sidewalk/street edge, increases moving back toward the house
coordinate_system.origin: Front-left corner of yard where left side yard line meets the sidewalk corner curve

displays.name: Interactive Witch
displays.notes: Front-left sidewalk corner of the yard, first display visitors meet. Anchor point for the graveyard scene.

displays.name: Singing Pumpkins (Jamboree)
displays.notes: Host table at the garage front by the driveway apron. Measured 22 ft from witch. No Govee lighting — owner may add standalone bluetooth lights. All Govee pairs are staged in the graveyard zone.

displays.name: AtmosFX Projection (side of house)
displays.notes: Projector now aims at the side of the house — no rear projection screen. Tombstone bluetooth lights are static hellish red/orange, set via app, not server-controlled.

lighting_plan.strategy: All 4 Govee pairs concentrated in the graveyard zone, staggered among scattered tombstones as ground uplights
lighting_plan.witch_pair: Uplight at witch + light in cauldron (spell-flash wired)
lighting_plan.remaining_pairs: Staggered diagonally through the tombstone field between the witch corner and the projection screen
lighting_plan.ambient_color_suggestion: Moonlight teal (r:0 g:140 b:150) as the base graveyard wash — reads as cold moonlight, contrasts the witch's green and lets storm white-flashes hit harder than purple does. Deep purple as alternate.
lighting_plan.jamboree: No Govee — standalone bluetooth lights if needed

measurements.consistency_check: All three pairwise distances verified against surveyed 57x44 ft yard — positions triangulate within ~2 ft

audio_analysis.explanation: 22 ft between the interactive witch (z3) and singing pumpkins (z1, garage table) is within outdoor speaker bleed range. Sound drops ~6 dB per doubling of distance; at 22 ft the pumpkins remain only ~10-12 dB down at the witch's microphone. The garage table position aims the speakers toward the driveway (away from the witch), which helps, but ducking is still required.

recommendation.trigger: Duck z1 by 8 dB whenever the witch speaks, listens, or is triggered (manual fire or witch timer). Restore z1 30 seconds after witch activity ends.
recommendation.note: IMPLEMENTED in server.js — fireWitch ducks z1 by 8 and restores after 30s, alongside her z3 boost. If interference persists during the witch's listening phase, increase to 12 dB.
